import json, re, unicodedata, itertools
from difflib import SequenceMatcher

# Load files
quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-FMu3bAgEAQtmEQQC8jx6tp-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-Q1ZkZ7hNQqPEcQ1vsVE9Pf-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran = json.load(f)

with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hadiths = json.load(f)

len(quran), len(hadiths)[:10] if isinstance(hadiths, list) else type(hadiths)

import re, unicodedata

# Arabic diacritics range
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
tatweel_pattern = re.compile(r'[\u0640]')

def normalize_ar(s):
    # remove tashkeel
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s)
    # remove tatweel
    s = tatweel_pattern.sub('', s)
    # unify hamza forms
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ٱ','ا')
    # remove non-letters/digits (punctuation)
    s = re.sub(r'[^\u0621-\u063A\u0641-\u0669\s]', ' ', s)
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

orig_span = "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُسِيرُ بِهِ نَفْسُهُ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَكِنْ لَا تُبْصِرُونَ"
snippet = "وَلَقَدْ خ...ُبْصِرُونَ"  # no use

n_orig = normalize_ar(orig_span)
n_orig

from difflib import SequenceMatcher

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # dynamic programming LCS length for sequences of characters
    # but may be expensive for long strings; here strings are short
    la, lb = len(a), len(b)
    dp = [[0]*(lb+1) for _ in range(la+1)]
    for i in range(la):
        ai = a[i]
        for j in range(lb):
            if ai == b[j]:
                dp[i+1][j+1] = dp[i][j] + 1
            else:
                dp[i+1][j+1] = max(dp[i][j+1], dp[i+1][j])
    return dp[la][lb]

def norm_ratio(a, b):
    # ratio based on LCS length / max length
    a_n = normalize_ar(a)
    b_n = normalize_ar(b)
    l = lcs_length(a_n, b_n)
    m = max(len(a_n), len(b_n))
    return l / m if m else 0.0

def token_f1(a, b):
    a_toks = normalize_ar(a).split()
    b_toks = normalize_ar(b).split()
    a_set = a_toks
    b_set = b_toks
    # counts as bag of words; compute overlap with multiplicities
    from collections import Counter
    ca, cb = Counter(a_set), Counter(b_set)
    overlap = sum((ca & cb).values())
    if overlap == 0:
        return 0.0
    precision = overlap / len(a_set)
    recall = overlap / len(b_set)
    if precision + recall == 0:
        return 0.0
    f1 = 2 * precision * recall / (precision + recall)
    return f1

# Search for top matches in Quran for the original span
scores = []
for v in quran:
    text = v['ayah_text']
    # compute ratio between orig_span and each ayah text
    r = norm_ratio(orig_span, text)
    f1 = token_f1(orig_span, text)
    # also SequenceMatcher ratio on normalized
    sm = SequenceMatcher(None, normalize_ar(orig_span), normalize_ar(text)).ratio()
    if r > 0.5 or f1 > 0.5 or sm > 0.5:
        scores.append((r, f1, sm, v))

# sort by r, sm, f1
scores_sorted = sorted(scores, key=lambda x: (x[0], x[2], x[1]), reverse=True)
len(scores_sorted), scores_sorted[:5]

matches = [v for v in quran if "لَا تُبْصِرُونَ" in v['ayah_text'] or "لا تبصرون" in normalize_ar(v['ayah_text'])]
len(matches), matches[:5]

candidates = [scores_sorted[0][3]]
cand_text = candidates[0]['ayah_text']
a = normalize_ar(orig_span)
b = normalize_ar(cand_text)
l = lcs_length(a, b)
len_a = len(a); len_b = len(b); l, len_a, len_b, l/len_a, l/len_b, 2*l/(len_a+len_b)

waqiah_85 = [v for v in quran if v['surah_id']==56 and v['ayah_id']==85][0]['ayah_text']
waqiah_85
